jobs.title: Senior Copywriter & Editorial Lead
jobs.description: About the Role As an exceptional Senior Copywriter & Editorial Lead you believe in the power of great writing. You doesn't settle for "good enough" copy, but rewrites a headline until it is impossible to ignore. You are someone who can transform complex B2B topics into compelling stories that people genuinely want to read. You'll own BauWatch's written voice across Europe, crafting high-impact copy that strengthens our brand, supports sales and generates demand across 11 European markets. From advertising headlines and website copy to email campaigns, customer stories, thought leadership and sales collateral, your words will shape how customers experience our brand. Beyond creating exception
jobs.why: It's a senior copywriting and editorial lead role, but your direct-response training under Shahzad Khan makes you highly capable of writing their high-converting B2B copy.
jobs.proposal_opener: I don't settle for 'good enough' headlines either—I write hook-driven, direct-response copy that stops B2B buyers in their tracks and forces them to read.
jobs.flags: senior role - position yourself as an ambitious, highly-trained junior ready to outwork the competition
jobs.summary: This position involves owning the brand's writing and translating complex B2B security topics into highly engaging stories and headlines. It requires an exceptional grasp of written English and editorial leadership.

jobs.title: Content Creator Social Media (m/w/d) - Fashion & Damenmode
jobs.description: Du bist kreativ, liebst Social Media und weißt genau, welcher Content Menschen begeistert? Dann suchen wir genau dich! Für unseren Damenmoden-Onlineshop suchen wir einen Content Creator (m/w/d), der täglich frischen und authentischen Content für unsere Community erstellt. Aufgaben Erstellung von Reels, TikToks, Storys und Beiträgen Entwicklung kreativer Content-Ideen passend zu aktuellen Trends Unterstützung bei Foto- und Videoshootings Content-Produktion mit Smartphone Qualifikation Erfahrung als Content Creator oder im Social Media Bereich Kreativität und ein Gespür für viralen Content Sicheres Auftreten vor und hinter der Kamera Kenntnisse in Canva, CapCut etc. sind von Vorteil Begeisteru
jobs.why: While the short-form video strategy matches your skills, the role is for a German-speaking fashion brand and likely requires on-camera presence.
jobs.proposal_opener: I design high-converting TikTok and Reel structures using pattern-interrupts and psychological hooks that turn casual viewers into fashion buyers.
jobs.flags: German language required; likely requires on-camera fashion presenting
jobs.summary: This role involves creating daily social media content like Reels, TikToks, and Stories for a women's fashion online shop. It focuses on creative community engagement and trend-driven content production.

jobs.title: Pflichtpraktikum Online Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description: In der Rolle des Online Marketing Managers (m/w/d) kalkulierst und steuerst du die Werbebudgets unserer Kunden. Ziel ist es die bestmögliche Sichtbarkeit mit einem vorgegebenen Budget zu erreichen. Um die Fortschritte der Arbeit auch dem Kunden zu übermitteln, werden regelmäßig Auswertungen erstellt. Auch die Positionierung der Produkte an gewünschten Werbeplätzen spielt hierbei eine große Rolle.🚀 Aufgaben Entwicklung von SEA-Strategien : Gemeinsam mit unseren Account Managern arbeitest du zielgerichtete SEA-Strategien aus und sorgst dafür, dass das volle Werbepotenzial auf Amazon ausgeschöpft wird. Keywordrecherche & Analyse : Du führst umfassende Keywordrecherchen durch und kümmerst dich u
jobs.why: Although it's an internship, it is a 'Pflichtpraktikum' (mandatory university internship) in Germany requiring technical budget management and German fluency.
jobs.proposal_opener: I want to bring my direct-response creative training to your marketplace clients, helping you boost CTRs and lower ad costs through better hook analysis.
jobs.flags: German language; requires enrollment in a German university (Pflichtpraktikum); technical media buying focus
jobs.summary: This is a mandatory student internship focusing on managing ad budgets and optimizing product visibility on marketplaces. It involves performance analysis and campaign reporting.

jobs.title: Senior Product Marketing Manager (f/m/d)
jobs.description: Apaleo is the world's most open, API-first property management platform powering the next generation of hospitality operations. Its modular, AI-powered infrastructure enables hoteliers to customise their tech stack, automate routine work, and deliver seamless, personalised guest experiences, powered by best-in-class apps and autonomous AI agents that adapt to every stay. As the hospitality industry enters the age of Agentic AI, where autonomous agents handle everything from revenue optimisation to guest communication, we need someone who can translate our deep technical capabilities into compelling, differentiated value for every segment and market we serve. As a Senior Product Marketing Man
jobs.why: This is a senior product marketing role for a complex API-first platform, which is a massive stretch for an early-career copywriter.
jobs.proposal_opener: Your API-first platform needs its complex tech translated into high-converting copy that hoteliers actually understand—here is how my direct-response background can help.
jobs.flags: senior role - position as eager junior; likely requires German/local presence
jobs.summary: This role involves leading the product marketing strategy for an API-first hospitality platform. You would bridge the gap between technical AI features and clear customer value.

jobs.title: Online Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
jobs.description: In der Rolle des Online Marketing Managers (m/w/d) kalkulierst und steuerst du die Werbebudgets unserer Kunden. Ziel ist es die bestmögliche Sichtbarkeit mit einem vorgegebenen Budget zu erreichen. Um die Fortschritte der Arbeit auch dem Kunden zu übermitteln, werden regelmäßig Auswertungen erstellt. Auch die Positionierung der Produkte an gewünschten Werbeplätzen spielt hierbei eine große Rolle.🚀 Aufgaben Strategieerarbeitung: Entwicklung von SEA-Strategien in enger Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Account Managern, um Werbepotenziale auf Amazon optimal auszuschöpfen und auszubauen. Keyword-Recherche & SEO-Optimierung: Durchführung von Keyword-Recherchen sowie On- und Offpage-Analysen zur kontinu
jobs.why: This role focuses heavily on technical media buying, budget allocation, and marketplace management in German, which diverges from your pure creative strategy focus.
jobs.proposal_opener: While I don't manage technical ad budgets, I can dramatically lower your client's CPA by engineering high-converting ad creatives and hook-heavy scripts.
jobs.flags: German language; technical media buying focus (not creative strategy)
jobs.summary: This role involves managing and optimizing advertising budgets for clients on online marketplaces to maximize visibility. It requires data analysis, performance reporting, and product positioning.

jobs.title: Senior Product Marketing Manager Sea Domain (m/f/d)
jobs.description: As the Senior Product Marketing Manager for the Sea Domain, you will be the strategic voice of Quantum Systems’ maritime autonomous solutions. You will define and drive the global go-to-market strategy for our Uncrewed Surface Vehicle (USV) and Uncrewed Underwater Vehicle (UUV) portfolios. You will bridge the gap between complex engineering and operational mission effectiveness, ensuring our value propositions resonate with naval operators and defence stakeholders. Reporting to the Head of Content Creation, you will serve as the domain expert within the Global Marketing team. Your mission is to translate high-end maritime technology into compelling narratives that differentiate Quantum Syste
jobs.why: This is a highly specialized, senior-level maritime drone marketing role that is a significant stretch for an early-career copywriter.
jobs.proposal_opener: Complex engineering only sells when translated into undeniable commercial value—here is how my direct-response copywriting can sharpen your global GTM messaging.
jobs.flags: highly senior and technical maritime drone niche; likely requires local/EU presence
jobs.summary: This role leads the global go-to-market strategy for uncrewed maritime and underwater vehicle portfolios. It requires bridging the gap between complex engineering and commercial sales.

jobs.title: Selbstständiger Handelsvertreter (m/w/d) Organic Content Marketing
jobs.description: Sind Sie begeistert von den Möglichkeiten der Künstlichen Intelligenz und haben eine Leidenschaft für Immobilien? smartConsulting Zauner, eine dynamische KI-Automatisierungs-Agentur, sucht einen engagierten Selbstständigen Handelsvertreter (m/w/d) im Bereich Organic Content Marketing. Als Teil unseres kleinen, schlagkräftigen Teams unterstützen Sie Immobilienmakler in der DACH-Region dabei, durch automatisierte Lösungen mehr Sichtbarkeit zu erlangen und bessere Leads zu generieren. Mit Ihrem Know-how im Content-Marketing tragen Sie dazu bei, unsere innovativen Produkte bekannt zu machen und die Marktpräsenz zu stärken. Wenn Kommunikation, Kreativität und Eigenverantwortung zu Ihren Stärken z
jobs.why: This is a commission-based sales representative role in Germany requiring German language skills, making it a major stretch despite the AI content focus.
jobs.proposal_opener: While my focus is on high-converting organic content and AI video production, I can help scale your agency's client acquisition through direct-response messaging.
jobs.flags: German language required; commission-only sales representative role
jobs.summary: The role is for an independent sales representative to drive organic content marketing and client acquisition for an AI real estate agency. It focuses heavily on sales and local German market outreach.
